response.justification: The candidate has a strong background in software development with a focus on AI and cloud technologies, and has experience in leadership roles and entrepreneurial ventures.
strengths: Proven experience in full-stack development and AI-agent infrastructure
Strong background in cloud technologies and software craftsmanship
Entrepreneurial experience with GISCollective, an open-source Geo-Data platform
concerns: Lack of direct experience in AI-related fields for a Master's or PhD
Limited experience in advising strategic customers and partners
Basic German language skills may be a limitation in a German-based role
